scripts.test: npm run test:cake && npm run test:class && npm run test:admin-calendar && npm run test:admin-reservation && npm run test:csv-security && npm run test:calendar-access && npm run test:reservation-api
scripts.test:class: TMP_DIR=/tmp/au-cake-test-$(date +%s); npx tsc tests/class-utils.test.ts --ignoreConfig --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --types node --outDir $TMP_DIR --skipLibCheck && node --test $TMP_DIR/tests/class-utils.test.js
scripts.test:cake: TMP_DIR=/tmp/au-cake-options-test-$(date +%s); VITE_MARKET=AU npx tsc tests/cake-options.test.ts --ignoreConfig --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --types node --outDir $TMP_DIR --skipLibCheck && VITE_MARKET=AU node --test $TMP_DIR/tests/cake-options.test.js
scripts.test:admin-reservation: TMP_DIR=/tmp/au-cake-admin-reservation-test-$(date +%s); VITE_MARKET=AU npx tsc tests/admin-reservation-edit.test.ts --ignoreConfig --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --types node --outDir $TMP_DIR --skipLibCheck && VITE_MARKET=AU node --test $TMP_DIR/tests/admin-reservation-edit.test.js
scripts.test:admin-calendar: TMP_DIR=/tmp/au-cake-admin-calendar-test-$(date +%s); VITE_MARKET=AU npx tsc tests/admin-calendar.test.ts --ignoreConfig --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --types node --outDir $TMP_DIR --skipLibCheck && VITE_MARKET=AU node --test $TMP_DIR/tests/admin-calendar.test.js
scripts.test:csv-security: TMP_DIR=/tmp/au-cake-csv-test-$(date +%s); VITE_MARKET=AU npx tsc tests/csv-security.test.ts --ignoreConfig --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --types node --outDir $TMP_DIR --skipLibCheck && VITE_MARKET=AU node --test $TMP_DIR/tests/csv-security.test.js
